name: CameraState
summary: (No description provided in vendor docs for Solibri.Rest.Model.CameraState.)

properties.name: Projection
properties.summary: Camera State Projection. Valid values are PERSPECTIVE and ORTHOGONAL

properties.name: Location
properties.summary: Location of the camera in 3D space. Unit of location is in Meters.

properties.name: UpDirection
properties.summary: Up direction of the camera as unit vector in 3D space

properties.name: Direction
properties.summary: Direction of the camera as unit vector in 3D space

properties.name: FieldOfView
properties.summary: Field of View. Unit is in Radians. This is only valid for Perspective Projection.

properties.name: ViewToWorldScale
properties.summary: View to World Scale. This is only valid for Orthogonal Projection.
